ValidationRule.description: Sales region required while creating a new Quote
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( NOT($Permission.CONTAINER_Bypass_Validation_Rule), OR($RecordType.Name = "Container GENSET Quote",$RecordType.Name = "Container NT Quote"), ISPICKVAL(CONTAINER_Sales_Region__c,"") )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Sales Region can not be blank on Quote.
